text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Yo, Digital! Watch out, 'cause I'm gonna prank you so good today!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Whoa! An oshi made contact with me! Is this for
real?! I'm drooling already! ☆)

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh! I've got an extra special somethin'
to mess with you this time!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Prepare yourself for a shock! My big plan to get
you is... ignoring you!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
You're always way too happy when I mess with
you, so I'm not gonna do anything!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Aaakhjf! It was better than I could hope for—a
declaration of cold indifference! And I got to hear
it straight from her mouth?!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Um, uhh, how's that work, I wonder?

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, she can't take it anymore!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ack! Not cool, I drooled on myself! Ugh, ahh!
Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Wha—why are you laughing? You're supposed to
be maaad!
